tuning: E A D G B E
content:
[Intro]
[ch]GbM9[/ch]  [ch]Fm7[/ch]  [ch]GbM9[/ch]  [ch]Fm7[/ch]

[Chorus]
[tab][ch]Db[/ch]  [ch]Eb[/ch]    [ch]Fm[/ch]
     Easy lover[/tab]
[tab]              [ch]Bbm7[/ch]    [ch]Cm7[/ch]    [ch]Fm[/ch]            [ch]Db[/ch]
 She'll get a hold on you believe it[/tab]
[tab][ch]Eb[/ch]       [ch]Fm[/ch]
 Like no other[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]Bbm7[/ch]              [ch]Cm7[/ch]     [ch]Fm[/ch]      [ch]Db[/ch]
 Before you know it you'll be on your knees[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]Eb[/ch]      [ch]Fm[/ch]
 She's an easy lover[/tab]
[tab]                  [ch]Bbm7[/ch]      [ch]Cm7[/ch]       [ch]Fm[/ch]      [ch]Db[/ch]
 She'll take your heart but you won't feel it[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]Eb[/ch]        [ch]Fm[/ch]
 She's like no other[/tab]
[tab]              [ch]Bbm7[/ch]       [ch]Cm7[/ch]     [ch]Fm[/ch]
 And I'm just trying to make you see[/tab]


[Verse]
[tab]           [ch]Db[/ch]
 She's the kind of girl you dream of[/tab]
 Dream of keeping hold of
[tab]          [ch]Eb[/ch]     [ch]Fm[/ch]
 You'd better forget it[/tab]
 You'll never get it
[tab] [ch]Cm[/ch]       [ch]Db[/ch]
 She will play around and leave you[/tab]
 Leave you and deceive you
[tab]    [ch]Eb[/ch]     [ch]Fm[/ch]
 Better forget it[/tab]
 Oh you'll regret it

[tab] [ch]Bbm7[/ch]                           [ch]Cm7[/ch]       [ch]Fm[/ch]
 No you'll never change her, so leave it, leave it[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bbm7[/ch]                      [ch]Cm7[/ch]          [ch]Fm[/ch]
     Get out quick 'cause seeing is believing[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]Bbm7[/ch]        [ch]Cm7[/ch]
 It's the only way[/tab]
[tab]              [ch]GbM9[/ch]
 You'll ever know[/tab]


[Chorus]
[tab] [ch]Db[/ch]       [ch]Eb[/ch]   [ch]Fm[/ch]

 She's like no other[/tab]
[tab]              [ch]Bbm7[/ch]       [ch]Cm7[/ch]     [ch]Fm[/ch]

[Verse]
[tab]            [ch]Db[/ch]
 You're the one that wants to hold her[/tab]
 Hold her and control her
[tab]          [ch]Eb[/ch]     [ch]Fm[/ch]
 You'd better forget it[/tab]
 You'll never get it
[tab]            [ch]Db[/ch]
 For she'll say that there's no other[/tab]
 Till she finds another
[tab]    [ch]Eb[/ch]     [ch]Fm[/ch]
 Better forget it[/tab]
 Oh you'll regret it

[Bridge]
[tab] [ch]Bbm7[/ch]                              [ch]Cm7[/ch]      [ch]Fm[/ch]
 And don't try to change her, just leave it, leave it[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bbm7[/ch]                          [ch]Fm[/ch]
 You're not the only one, ooh seeing is believing[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]Bbm7[/ch]       [ch]Cm7[/ch]  [ch]Fm[/ch]

[tab]               [ch]GbM9[/ch]   [ch]Fm7[/ch]  [ch]GbM9[/ch]  [ch]Fm7[/ch]
 You'll ever know, ah ah[/tab]
